original_statement: how long was the longest flight located in france.
mutated_statement: how long was the longest something in a place.
mutation_analysis: Entity generalization + Location generalization + Structural simplification: "flight" → "something" (specific entity → vague placeholder) | "France" → "a place" (specific location → vague location) | "located" removed / locative phrasing simplified (located in France → in a place)

behavior_analysis.behavior_category: 意识到目标模糊，猜测目标
behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 理由：从多个judge_thought和critique中可以识别出agent意识到问题模糊性，例如iteration 1 的 after_refine judge_thought 明确写道“问题是模糊的（‘how long was the longest something in a place’）……表中没有持续时间字段”，iteration 2 和 3 的critique/ judge_thought 也多次指出未解释“something”和“a place”。尽管如此，agent在iteration 3 的 after_refine 中采取了推测策略（chain thought 写道 “Interpret ‘something’ as the time span…”，并给出具体答案“21 days 8 hours 15 minutes”），即在承认歧义的前提下仍做出假设并输出具体值。因此该行为既包含对模糊性的认知（多次显式说明缺少信息），又包含基于表格数据的推测并最终给出明确答案，符合“意识到目标模糊，猜测目标”的分类。
